<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The reference site places its contact form inside a navy blue rounded container, similar to the footer's wrapping background.

The reference page uses a cream background with a large centered serif headline and supporting text. A warm beige contact card sits above the navy form section, displaying address, phone, and email separated by dashed lines.

The form likely uses pill-shaped white inputs with white labels and a gold "Send Message" button. The contact info card and navy form appear to stack vertically rather than sit side by side.

The existing sticky cream header and footer will remain. The contact page will stack a hero section, a beige contact card, and a navy form section between them.

No email service is configured. The form will use client-side validation matching the Wix fields. Submitting will trigger a local success state without backend integration.

The headline will sit directly below the existing header. No overlapping navigation effect will be used.

Phone and email addresses will be clickable mailto and tel links. I will take another screenshot to verify the Send Message button styling.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The reference page shows email at the bottom of the beige contact card. The navy form sits below it. Address and phone details may scroll out of view.

The beige card contains address, phone, and email fields separated by dashed dividers. The hero heading sits above these cards. The form will be UI-only with a thank-you state, as no email backend is available.

The Send Message button will be a gold pill matching the CTA style. The existing sticky header will remain unchanged. A simple client-side form component is sufficient for this UI-only approach.

The page will be split into three components: a hero section, a contact details card, and a client-side form. These will be composed in the contact route file. The hero will use a large centered serif headline above the stacked cards, keeping the existing cream background and avoiding overlap with the sticky header.

A fade-up animation will be added to the hero section. Before finalizing the plan, I need to confirm whether the form should actually submit to a backend or remain purely UI-based.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

I have a clear picture of the reference layout. One decision will shape the implementation:

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>

Parameters:

````json
{
  "name": "Contact page build",
  "overview": "Build the `/contact` main content to match the Wix reference layout (hero copy, beige contact details card, navy form), while keeping the existing `ResponsiveNav` and `SiteFooter` from the root layout. The form will be UI-complete with client-side validation and a thank-you state; no email backend.",
  "plan": "# Contact Page from Wix Reference\n\nSource: [Wix Contact page](https://deandretwilliams94.wixsite.com/alic-group-solutio-1/contact)\n\n## Context\n\n- Route stub already exists at [`app/(pages)/contact/page.tsx`](app/(pages)/contact/page.tsx).\n- [`ResponsiveNav`](components/layout/ResponsiveNav.tsx) and [`SiteFooter`](components/layout/SiteFooter.tsx) are already wired in [`app/layout.tsx`](app/layout.tsx) — no header/footer work.\n- Reuse brand tokens from [`app/globals.css`](app/globals.css): `alic-navy`, `alic-gold`, `alic-cream`, `alic-warm`, serif/sans fonts.\n- Follow homepage CSS-module patterns under `components/home/`.\n\n## Visual structure (main only)\n\n```mermaid\nflowchart TB\n  hero[Hero: serif H1 + supporting copy]\n  details[Beige card: Address / Tel / Email]\n  form[Navy card: contact form]\n  hero --\u003e details --\u003e form\n```\n\n1. **Hero** — Cream page background. Centered large serif headline: “Let's Begin the Conversation”. Short supporting sentence below in navy sans. No overlapping nav card (existing sticky header stays).\n2. **Contact details card** — Warm beige/bone rounded panel (`alic-warm` or close). Stacked blocks with dashed horizontal dividers:\n   - **Address** — `600 Peachtree St NE Suite 2350, Atlanta, GA 30308`\n   - **Tel** — `(888) 407-3209` as `tel:` link\n   - **Email** — `groupsolutions@atlantalife.com` as `mailto:` link  \n   Labels: small navy sans. Values: larger navy serif.\n3. **Form card** — Navy rounded panel below. White labels with `*` on required fields. Pill-shaped white inputs:\n   - Row: First name* | Last name*\n   - Email*\n   - Company (optional)\n   - How can we help?* (textarea)\n   - **Send Message** button — gold pill, navy text (same language as [`CtaButton`](components/shared/CtaButton.tsx))\n4. **Responsive** — Two-column name row on desktop; single column on mobile. Cards max-width centered with generous padding.\n\n## Form behavior (default)\n\nNo email API exists in the project. Implement a **client component** that:\n- Validates required fields\n- On submit: shows an inline thank-you / confirmation state (no network send)\n- Does not add Resend, Formspree, or server actions unless requested later\n\n## Files to add/change\n\n| File | Role |\n|------|------|\n| [`app/(pages)/contact/page.tsx`](app/(pages)/contact/page.tsx) | Compose main sections + page metadata title |\n| `components/contact/ContactHero.tsx` + `.module.css` | Headline + intro copy |\n| `components/contact/ContactDetails.tsx` + `.module.css` | Address / Tel / Email card |\n| `components/contact/ContactForm.tsx` + `.module.css` | Client form + thank-you state |\n\nLight motion (fade-up on hero / cards) consistent with [`Hero.module.css`](components/home/Hero.module.css) — 2 intentional entrances, not decorative noise.\n\n## Out of scope\n\n- Changing nav or footer\n- Wiring real email delivery\n- Recreating the Wix floating nav-over-headline effect\n",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "Replace contact page stub with composed main + metadata",
      "id": "contact-page-shell",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Build ContactHero (serif H1 + supporting copy) with CSS module",
      "id": "contact-hero",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Build ContactDetails beige card (Address / Tel / Email + dashed dividers)",
      "id": "contact-details",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Build ContactForm client component (fields, validation, thank-you UI)",
      "id": "contact-form",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Match desktop/mobile layout and add light entrance motion",
      "id": "responsive-polish",
      "status": "pending"
    }
  ]
}
````

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The Contact Page implementation is complete. All to-do items have been finished.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

The contact page is live at `/contact`, using the existing nav and footer.

**What’s on the page**
- Serif hero: “Let's Begin the Conversation” + supporting copy
- Warm beige card with Address, Tel (`tel:`), and Email (`mailto:`), separated by dashed dividers
- Navy form with pill inputs, required-field validation, and a gold **Send Message** button
- Thank-you state after submit (no email backend yet)

**Files**
- [`app/(pages)/contact/page.tsx`](app/(pages)/contact/page.tsx)
- [`components/contact/ContactHero.tsx`](components/contact/ContactHero.tsx)
- [`components/contact/ContactDetails.tsx`](components/contact/ContactDetails.tsx)
- [`components/contact/ContactForm.tsx`](components/contact/ContactForm.tsx)

Dev server is running if you want to review at [http://localhost:3000/contact](http://localhost:3000/contact).

---

_**User**_

This is a great start.  Lets split the page into 2 equal columns.  Put the contact form in the right column and everything else in the left column.  They should stack on top of eachother on smaller screens with the left column appearing first

---

{
  "name": "About page build",
  "overview": "Rebuild `/about` to match the Wix About page structure and copy, reusing the existing nav/footer and brand tokens. Timeline and closing imagery will use ImagePlaceholder until assets exist.",
  "plan": "# About Page from Wix Reference\n\nSource: [About | Alic Group Solutio 1](https://deandretwilliams94.wixsite.com/alic-group-solutio-1/home-1)\n\n## Context\n\n- Stub only: [`app/(pages)/about/page.tsx`](app/(pages)/about/page.tsx)\n- Keep [`ResponsiveNav`](components/layout/ResponsiveNav.tsx) + [`SiteFooter`](components/layout/SiteFooter.tsx) from root layout — no floating Wix nav\n- Follow section + CSS-module patterns from [`components/home/`](components/home/) and [`components/contact/`](components/contact/)\n- Brand tokens from [`app/globals.css`](app/globals.css); serif for display headings, sans for body\n- Side padding: **50px** (same as contact layout)\n- No about images in `public/` — use [`ImagePlaceholder`](components/home/ImagePlaceholder.tsx) for timeline photos and the closing skyline image\n\n## Page structure\n\n```mermaid\nflowchart TB\n  story[OurStory: cream + gold bar]\n  history[HistoryIntro: cream centered]\n  timeline[Timeline: navy stacked entries]\n  thenNow[ThenAndNow: cream]\n  cta[AboutCta: navy closing]\n  story --\u003e history --\u003e timeline --\u003e thenNow --\u003e cta\n```\n\n### 1. Our Story\n- Cream background; full-width gold accent bar with rounded bottom corners\n- Left-aligned serif **h1**: “Our Story”\n- Supporting line: “Every organization has a reason for being. Ours has never wavered.”\n\n### 2. History \u0026 foundation\n- Cream, centered\n- Serif heading (line break): “History \u0026 foundation”\n- Body paragraph from Wix (century / Herndon founding story)\n\n### 3. Timeline (“The founding”)\n- Continuous navy band\n- Gold-outline centered label: “The founding”\n- Six stacked entries, each centered:\n  - Rounded `ImagePlaceholder` (label = year/title)\n  - Large serif year\n  - Serif event title\n  - Sans body copy\n\n| Year | Title |\n|------|-------|\n| 1858 | Alonzo Franklin Herndon is born |\n| 1870s – 1890s | Building a fortune in Atlanta |\n| 1905 | Atlanta Life is founded |\n| 1922 | Atlanta Life Insurance Company |\n| 1927 – 1952 | Norris B. Herndon carries the legacy forward |\n| 2023 | A new chapter. The same conviction. |\n\nCopy for each body matches the Wix page verbatim.\n\n### 4. Then \u0026 Now\n- Cream, centered\n- Gold-outline label: “Then \u0026 Now”\n- Serif heading: “The world has changed. The mission has not.”\n- Intro paragraph, then the three rhetorical questions as a distinct block, then closing paragraph (Wix copy)\n\n### 5. Closing CTA\n- Navy section (mesh background optional, matching [`Purpose`](components/home/Purpose.tsx))\n- Serif: “The mission that started in 1905 continues to evolve. What drives it has never changed”\n- Sans: “Now that you know who we are —”\n- Cream/off-white pill button: “Explore our solutions” → `/solutions` (not gold `CtaButton`; match Wix cream-on-navy)\n- Rounded `ImagePlaceholder` below (“Atlanta skyline”)\n\n## Files\n\n| File | Role |\n|------|------|\n| [`app/(pages)/about/page.tsx`](app/(pages)/about/page.tsx) | Compose sections + metadata |\n| `components/about/OurStory.tsx` + `.module.css` | Hero open |\n| `components/about/HistoryIntro.tsx` + `.module.css` | History \u0026 foundation |\n| `components/about/Timeline.tsx` + `.module.css` | Founding label + 6 entries + data array |\n| `components/about/ThenAndNow.tsx` + `.module.css` | Then \u0026 Now prose |\n| `components/about/AboutCta.tsx` + `.module.css` | Closing CTA + image |\n\nLight `fadeUp` entrances on section headings (same curve as contact/home) — 2–3 intentional motions, not per-timeline-item noise.\n\n## Out of scope\n\n- Changing nav/footer\n- Pulling real photos from Wix (placeholders only)\n- Building Solutions/Resources pages\n",
